title: Pratyangira temple, Hosur
tagline: Pratyangira temple, Hosur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Maa Pratyangira Kalika Alayam is a temple located in Moranapalli, Hosur, Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Maa Pratyangira Kalika Alayam is a temple located in Moranapalli, Hosur, Tamil Nadu. It has the biggest Pratyangira statue and it is on the gopuram on the temple. The temple has many people in the weekends and on weekdays. The temple worships Pratyangira, Sharabha, Narasimha, and Mariamman.

topPlaces.description: Kelavarapalli is a village in the Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India. There is a dam across the Ponnaiyar river in this village.

topPlaces.name: Chandra Choodeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: The Chandra Choodeswarar Temple is an ancient Shiva temple located on a rocky hill in the city of Hosur, Krishnagiri District, Tamil Nadu. Due to variations in the local languages (Tamil, Kannada, Telugu) and dialects, the temple is also referred to as 'Chandira Choodeshwarar', 'Chandra Choodeshwara', 'Chandra Choodeshwar', 'Shri Choodeswarar' or 'Arulmigu Chandra Choodeshwarar'.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pratyangira temple, Hosur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pratyangira temple, Hosur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pratyangira temple, Hosur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (55 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (43 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pratyangira temple, Hosur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pratyangira temple, Hosur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pratyangira temple, Hosur?
faq.a: Stays in Pratyangira temple, Hosur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pratyangira temple, Hosur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karibasanapuram, Chennathur, Chinnakullu, Kelavarapalli, Chandra Choodeswarar Temple.
